items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fast owner-centric index.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Fast owner-centric index for API/UI'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or results that confirm the existence or performance of such an index. The linked use cases and prior step evidence primarily focus on booking confirmations and user interactions, which do not address the specific requirement of an owner-centric index, leading to an inconclusive result.
